title: Add keyboard send (Enter key) and Send button to message input

requirements.summary: Update message input in ConversationView to support Enter key to send (Shift+Enter for newline)
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing Enter in the message input field sends the message without requiring a button click.
Pressing Shift+Enter inserts a newline in the message input instead of sending.
After sending via Enter, the input field is cleared.

file_operations.description: Add onKeyDown event handler to the message input textarea that detects Enter key presses. If Enter is pressed without Shift, prevent default behavior, trigger the sendMessage mutation (only if input is non-empty), and clear the input. If Shift+Enter is pressed, allow default newline insertion behavior.

requirements.summary: Add a visible Send button alongside the message input in ConversationView
acceptanceCriteria: A Send button is visible next to the message text input at all times.
Clicking the Send button submits the current message.
The Send button is disabled when the input is empty.
After sending via the button, the input field is cleared and focus returns to the input.

file_operations.description: Add a Send button adjacent to the message textarea in the input area. Style the button consistently with the Arena neon dark theme using existing design tokens (e.g., arena-accent color, neon glow effects). Disable the button when the message input is empty (trimmed). On click, invoke the sendMessage mutation, clear the input, and return focus to the textarea. Ensure the button layout integrates smoothly with the existing message input container (e.g., flex row with textarea and button side-by-side).
